retry_reason: The refcount decrement always succeeds; if the refcount was already zero the caller has a double-free bug that retrying cannot fix.
contract_summary: Put wrapper for struct btrfs_caching_control. Decrements the reference count; if it reaches zero, the object is freed via kfree. After calling this function, the caller must not access the object pointer. No special locking or RCU requirements. This function does not return a value; the caller does not need to check the return.
